name: One Source Financial, Inc.
description_short: One Source Financial, Inc. is a black-owned financial services company based in Jersey City offering insurance products and financial protection solutions.
description_long:
One Source Financial, Inc. is listed as a black-owned financial services provider located at 60 Madison Ave, Jersey City, NJ 07304. The company operates under the BuyBlack.org directory, a platform dedicated to promoting and driving traffic to minority-owned businesses. Operating hours are Monday-Friday 9AM-5PM (Wednesday until 7PM) and Saturday 10AM-1PM, with phone support available at 800-654-9901.

Based on the available website information, One Source Financial specializes in insurance products and financial protection services. The company is categorized within the broader financial services sector and specifically identified with insurance offerings. However, detailed information about specific insurance products, coverage types, or service offerings is not provided in the accessible website content.

What distinguishes One Source Financial is its certification and visibility as a black-owned business within the BuyBlack.org ecosystem, which aims to close revenue disparity gaps between black-owned and non-black businesses. The company maintains standard business hours and provides direct phone contact for inquiries, positioning itself as an accessible local financial services provider in the Jersey City market.

A significant caveat is that the company's detailed service pages (About and Contact sub-pages) return 404 errors, limiting transparency about specific offerings, credentials, licensing, insurance types offered, or company background. Prospective customers would need to contact the business directly at the provided phone number to understand what insurance products are available, coverage limits, pricing, and qualifications required.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Black-owned business certified and listed on BuyBlack.org directory
Local Jersey City presence with accessible physical address
Direct phone support line (800-654-9901) for customer inquiries
Part of organized business network aimed at supporting minority-owned enterprises
Standard business hours across weekdays with evening extension on Wednesday
cons: Website provides minimal detail about specific insurance products or coverage types offered
Company's About and Contact detail pages are not accessible (404 errors), limiting transparency
No information available about licensing, certifications, credentials, or regulatory compliance
No customer reviews or testimonials visible on the directory listing
Limited online presence makes it difficult to verify service offerings or company history
best_for: Consumers seeking to support black-owned financial service businesses
Jersey City and surrounding area residents preferring local financial services
Individuals looking for personal contact with a local insurance provider
diagnosis: One Source Financial, Inc. appears to be a black-owned insurance provider in Jersey City, best suited for consumers prioritizing support of minority-owned businesses or preferring local face-to-face financial services. The primary caveat is the lack of detailed public information about specific insurance products offered and the inaccessibility of additional company details online—direct phone contact is necessary to understand their specific services and qualifications.
services: In-person services at Jersey City location
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
